question: cyWhen did the defendant receive notice from {{claimantName}} (optional)?
paragraph: cy{{claimantName}} did not provide the date they served the defendant notice.

date.notRealDate: cyThe date the defendant received notice must be a real date
date.futureDate: cyThe date the defendant received notice must either be today’s date or in the past
date.invalidValue: cyThe date the defendant received notice must be a real date
date.missingOne: cyThe date the defendant received notice must include a {{missingField}}
date.missingTwo: cyThe date the defendant received notice must include a {{first}} and {{second}}
